shortDescription.default: Preview engineering, process, and architecture files in SharePoint

longDescription.default: Adds a self-contained SharePoint command set, BPMN renderer, and tenant admin page for opening supported engineering, process, and architecture files in a same-page preview dialog. BPMN process diagrams are enabled by default, with optional Microsoft 365 File Handler registration for native OneDrive integration.

features.title: File Preview Command Set
features.description: Deploys the document-library preview command and tenant admin page.
